title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Australian Curry Sauce
description: A flavorful and indulgent dish that combines the freshness of salmon with the spices of Australian curry. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a romantic dinner.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked to your liking.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, make the Australian curry sauce by combining the curry powder, garlic, ginger, and heavy cream in a small saucepan.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Stir in the butter until melted and smooth.
Serve the salmon fillets with the Australian curry sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
